executive_summary: Api Key dominates authentication (81.0% of apps), followed by Token (69.0%).
74.0% of apps offer self-serve API access, making them immediate integration candidates for Composio.
Only 46.0% of apps have MCP servers — a massive opportunity for Composio to provide AI-native access.
92.0% of apps are ready for toolkit integration today, with 15 identified as high-priority easy wins.

auth_distribution.note: Percentages may exceed 100% because apps can support multiple auth methods

blocker_ranking.blocker: Requires partnership agreement or contact sales.
